page_content:
Courses offered by this department may be found under the acronym GEOG.

Program Objectives Mission To make fundamental contributions to the advancement of geographic science by:

Conducting disciplinary and integrative research in the physical and social sciences that spans local to global scales, with an emphasis on a geospatial perspective of our changing planet and its sustainability.

Equipping undergraduate and graduate students to meet the

challenges associated with the continuing evolution of geographic science while providing them with vibrant and fulﬁlling educational experiences.

Applying geographic science to societal and environmental issues in
